programme.title: E1 - Hot Girl Summer
programme.desc: Dorit has recently filed for divorce and opens up to the ladies about her ex, their children and if she's ready for a Hot Girl Summer. Kyle is planning Alexia's wedding and navigating life with Mauricio. Sutton must reassess her friendships in the group after being cut off by her former bestie. A familiar face makes a fashionable entrance at Kyle's Summer Solstice Party as Kathy arrives with Rachel Zoe.

programme.title: E5 - Not Feeling The Healing
programme.desc: In Sedona, Kyle and Dorit's rift persists. While Boz and Rachel struggle with the heat, others hike to a vortex. Amanda shares rumors about Sutton's ex-assistant, and Jennifer Tilly clashes with Sutton.

programme.title: E12 - Arrivederci Beverly Hills
programme.desc: After smooth sailing in the Hamptons, tensions rise when Dorit discovers Kyle has been talking behind her back.

programme.title: E15 - Stranded Under The Tuscan Sun
programme.desc: As the Italian getaway heats up, Sutton alerts Amanda to comments being made behind her back.

programme.title: E6 - New Hampshire Seacoast
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores New Hampshire's seacoast and finds that the bounty of the local waters is the star of the local cuisine.

programme.title: E6 - Spring Declutter
programme.desc: The six remaining competitors are challenged to make minimalist creations that are both flourless and flower-less.

programme.title: E3 - Cookie Delivery
programme.desc: Zoe wants to give her college son a taste of home by baking delicious chocolate chip cookies that highlight a friend's fun technique.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

programme.title: Le club Paris direct[Live]

programme.title: E1 - How to Catch a Lizard
programme.desc: Tag along as Dr. Amanda rescues a blind pet baboon, and watch Dr. Charlotte’s tricky surgery on a pangolin whose leg must be amputated after a run-in with poachers. Later, chase a rhino, two young baboons gone AWOL, and a fiesty monitor lizard.

programme.title: E2 - An Island Home
programme.desc: Face a tough decision when Esti’s leg infection puts the brakes on this young duiker’s release. Then track and collar a young lion with Dr. Amanda; check on an ailing bush baby; and greet the noisy new addition to the center, a grumpy grey parrot.

programme.title: E1 - How to Catch a Lizard
programme.desc: Tag along as Dr. Amanda rescues a blind pet baboon, and watch Dr. Charlotte’s tricky surgery on a pangolin whose leg must be amputated after a run-in with poachers. Later, chase a rhino, two young baboons gone AWOL, and a fiesty monitor lizard.

programme.title: E2 - An Island Home
programme.desc: Face a tough decision when Esti’s leg infection puts the brakes on this young duiker’s release. Then track and collar a young lion with Dr. Amanda; check on an ailing bush baby; and greet the noisy new addition to the center, a grumpy grey parrot.

programme.title: E1 - River of Life
programme.desc: Avoid scaly and feathery dangers with wallabies, see koolamana lizards battle for mates, and feast with crocodile hatchlings. Brave dangerous rapids and understand the cultural and biological importance of a local river as the rainy season arrives.

programme.title: E2 - Tidal Territory
programme.desc: Battle for dominion over the river with crocs, then catch glimpses of an ultra-rare mangrove snake and an endangered nabarlek wallaby. Take to the ocean to see humpback whale mothers raise their calves, then be hunted by false killer whales.

programme.title: E5 - Hot Springs Pack
programme.desc: Meet a close-knit family of wild dogs who work together to raise pups and hunt enough food to feed the whole pack. While their well-coordinated hunts are successful, the wet season brings challenges when some of the team strikes out on their own.

programme.title: E4 - Jaguar Den
programme.desc: In the heart of Brazil, the largest cat in the Americas, the magnificent jaguar, reigns over a magical land filled with natural beauty and diversity.

programme.title: E2 - Tidal Territory
programme.desc: Battle for dominion over the river with crocs, then catch glimpses of an ultra-rare mangrove snake and an endangered nabarlek wallaby. Take to the ocean to see humpback whale mothers raise their calves, then be hunted by false killer whales.

programme.title: E5 - The Hollow Heart
programme.desc: This is the incredible story of a tree that has been around for eight hundred years… that can withstand the harshest conditions… and that is more loved by insects, birds and animals than any other…the enormous Baobab. Rooted on the savannah of Malilangwe Game Reserve in southern Zimbabwe.

programme.title: E1 - Growing Up Gibbon
programme.desc: Hoolock Gibbons are specialists of the Jungle. Living in close knit families, youngsters spend years learning the skills to survive. Meet Samar as he forages for food, avoids predators, and masters the acrobatics required for a life in the trees.

programme.title: E3 - Wild Stallions of the Himalayas
programme.desc: The Ladakh plateau is a land of extremes, but the Tibetan wild ass is the king of this grassland. Follow one stallion as he shadows a herd of females for his chance to sire the next generation, but in doing so, he must battle those wanting his crown!

programme.title: E4 - A Sloth Bear's Dilemma
programme.desc: In a land of heat and tropical storms, life on the plains of southern India is tough. But Bibi, a female sloth bear with two cubs, is up for the challenge of her life as she fights against drought, food scarcity, and predators around every corner.

programme.title: E1 - Trials of Olimba
programme.desc: Enter the heart of Zambia’s Luangwa Valley, where shady woodlands and antelope-packed plains offer the perfect hunting grounds for an audacious female leopard named Olimba and the pack she must struggle to control.

programme.title: E5 - Hot Springs Pack

programme.desc: Tag along as Dr. Amanda rescues a blind pet baboon, and watch Dr. Charlotte’s tricky surgery on a pangolin whose leg must be amputated after a run-in with poachers. Later, chase a rhino, two young baboons gone AWOL, and a fiesty monitor lizard.

programme.title: E2 - An Island Home
programme.desc: Face a tough decision when Esti’s leg infection puts the brakes on this young duiker’s release. Then track and collar a young lion with Dr. Amanda; check on an ailing bush baby; and greet the noisy new addition to the center, a grumpy grey parrot.

programme.title: E1 - River of Life
programme.desc: Avoid scaly and feathery dangers with wallabies, see koolamana lizards battle for mates, and feast with crocodile hatchlings. Brave dangerous rapids and understand the cultural and biological importance of a local river as the rainy season arrives.

programme.title: E2 - Tidal Territory
programme.desc: Battle for dominion over the river with crocs, then catch glimpses of an ultra-rare mangrove snake and an endangered nabarlek wallaby. Take to the ocean to see humpback whale mothers raise their calves, then be hunted by false killer whales.

programme.title: E5 - Hot Springs Pack
programme.desc: Meet a close-knit family of wild dogs who work together to raise pups and hunt enough food to feed the whole pack. While their well-coordinated hunts are successful, the wet season brings challenges when some of the team strikes out on their own.

programme.title: E4 - Jaguar Den
programme.desc: In the heart of Brazil, the largest cat in the Americas, the magnificent jaguar, reigns over a magical land filled with natural beauty and diversity.

programme.title: E5 - The Hollow Heart
programme.desc: This is the incredible story of a tree that has been around for eight hundred years… that can withstand the harshest conditions… and that is more loved by insects, birds and animals than any other…the enormous Baobab. Rooted on the savannah of Malilangwe Game Reserve in southern Zimbabwe.

programme.title: E1 - Growing Up Gibbon
programme.desc: Hoolock Gibbons are specialists of the Jungle. Living in close knit families, youngsters spend years learning the skills to survive. Meet Samar as he forages for food, avoids predators, and masters the acrobatics required for a life in the trees.

programme.title: E3 - Wild Stallions of the Himalayas
programme.desc: The Ladakh plateau is a land of extremes, but the Tibetan wild ass is the king of this grassland. Follow one stallion as he shadows a herd of females for his chance to sire the next generation, but in doing so, he must battle those wanting his crown!

programme.title: E4 - A Sloth Bear's Dilemma
programme.desc: In a land of heat and tropical storms, life on the plains of southern India is tough. But Bibi, a female sloth bear with two cubs, is up for the challenge of her life as she fights against drought, food scarcity, and predators around every corner.

programme.title: E1 - Trials of Olimba
programme.desc: Enter the heart of Zambia’s Luangwa Valley, where shady woodlands and antelope-packed plains offer the perfect hunting grounds for an audacious female leopard named Olimba and the pack she must struggle to control.

programme.title: E227
programme.desc: MY HONG KONG STORY: Each episode of My Hong Kong Story features a Hong Kong native, or those who surround their tale here. Interviewees convey their indigenized story in a personnel aspect. With a 15-minute essence per episode, the cinematic language brings a new perspective to observe Hong Kong for Chinese-speaking audience around the world. Everyone can have an indepth understanding of Hong Kong and its people.

programme.title: E10 - Hard Truths of Conservation
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela’s” in 1961, he was unaware it would become the foremost outfitting store in the world. So it’s only fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. Join Dan Cabela, on this high-impact journey of discovery, as he uncovers some lesser-known facts about conservation. In particular, the role which hunting and the utilization of wildlife can play as a modern-day conservation tool.

programme.title: E3 - Warwick Davis
programme.desc: Legendary actor Warwick Davis is on a Mission with Bear Grylls in the mountains of the Lake District.

programme.title: E8 - Axis Deer
programme.desc: Yia travels to Texas to hunt arguably the tastiest of all deer. Native to India, the Axis deer were introduced in Texas in 1932 as a prized game meat for ranchers. The Texas hill country turned out to be the perfect habitat for Axis deer, who quickly escaped their high fence ranches, establishing a healthy wild breeding population. Now with over 150,000 Axis deer roaming the hill country, these deer are competing with native white tail deer for resources. Local rancher Chris Hughes has a solution- a mobile harvesting trailer where he culls wild Axis deer from overpopulated farms. Chris will show Yia how harvesting this species has become a full-time business and delicious solution.

programme.title: The Rising Star -Ho Kai Wa
programme.desc: Ho Kai Wa was first seen for his exceptional dancing skill, yet dancing was only a stepping stone to pursue his dream of becoming an actor. He often brings joy to the audience, but behind the scene he actually bears immense pressure since was overwhelmed by the 'comedic relief' label. Now that he has established himself in the film industry with two films grossed over HK$100 million at the box office. It seems that he has achieved his dream, yet he feels lost and disoriented... In this episode, Kai Wa will shed his on-screen image and talk about his film journey.

programme.title: The Lady Improper
programme.desc: Born in a culinary family, Siu Man has always led an ideal life - Good grades, a financially viable job and a loving husband. But one thing has always plagued her: A fear of intimacy. After the end of her sexless marriage and several life crises, Siu Man reboots her life by taking over her father's restaurant. She hires Jiahao, a ‘culinary philosopher' who takes a creative approach to cooking. To help save the restaurant, Jiahao decides to mentor Siu Man, opening her up to his culinary world. In the process, Siu Man becomes attracted to his masculinity, intelligence and his mastery of culinary skills. After seeing her usually conservative friends let loose at a wedding party, Siu Man realizes that it's time to tackle her fear of intimacy head-on. With the help of a new friend, Siu Man embarks on a journey of liberation, starting with pole dancing lessons and returning to the dating scene. When she secretly spies on Jiahao's wild tryst with another woman, Siu Man finally exper

programme.title: E209 - The Itching Scratch
programme.desc: Leo suits up as the Night Ninja one last time to take on the villainous cat named Scratch and his mutant Vampire Fleas. It's a grudge-match fifteen years in the making! But what does it all have to do with Splinter? The final battle begins!

programme.title: E908 - Ship Wreckers / Writer's Retreat
programme.desc: Leni and Luna accidentally wreck Gramps boat when their small viewing party gets out of control. // Lucy struggles to come with ideas when she's given the opportunity to write an original story for the Royal Wood's Gazette.

programme.title: E290 - Spatula of the Heavens / Gary's Playhouse
programme.desc: SpongeBob embarks on an epic journey to have his beloved spatula reforged by the legendary Guru Greasetrap. // SpongeBob builds a snail-house outside for Gary to play in while he is at work.

programme.title: E515 - Director's Rut / Friday Night Fights
programme.desc: Luan turns to Mr. Coconuts for help after she struggles to direct her school's play. // Lisa joins Lynn's football team as the analytics coach to prove that math will always beat out heart.

programme.title: E105 - Meats of Strength / Dead Ed's
programme.desc: Jack's new friend Beef invites him to a sleepover. Jack, a sleepover newb, freaks out over impressing his new friend. // Jack & Lil try to prove they're the one true local, enduring a series of bizarre quests in the local dive restaurant Dead Ed's.

programme.title: E332 - Karen's Klatch
programme.desc: Plankton infiltrates a party thrown by Karen for her computer friends, but Karen quickly uncovers his ruse.

programme.title: E105 - Mar-Snoop / Canteen Carnage
programme.desc: On her quest to get her own Marsupilami, Bibi encounters a Jaguar which scares her enough to give up the hunt. // Marcel gets a job as the school chef after Jade causes the usual one to quit.

programme.title: E821 - Roman Day
programme.desc: Granny Pig, Peppa and George have fun dressing up as Romans, making a pebble mosaic and learning a little Latin!

programme.desc: Every barbababy is invited to show their greatest talent on stage. // Video games are fun, but you also need to know how to enjoy the nice weather!

programme.title: E136 - Sleepy Princess
programme.desc: Daddy Pig tells Peppa and George a story about a princess who needs sleep. In the story, Peppa is the princess, George is the prince, Mummy Pig is the queen, and Daddy Pig is the king.

programme.title: E137 - The Tree House
programme.desc: Peppa and George visit Granny Pig and Grandpa Pig's house. Grandpa Pig has built a tree house for them.

programme.desc: Barbazoo is ready to help. But Barbabright and Barbabelle abuse his kindness and drive him crazy. // By chance, Barbazoo realizes he can imitate Barbapapa. He uses this opportunity to distribute chores to his brothers and sisters. Will they find out?

programme.title: E107 - The Rainforest Ritmo / The Magic Nut
programme.desc: Isa's throwing a party where everyone will be dancing the Rainforest Ritmo. Boots has to learn the dance before they get there! // Dora leads everyone into the Tricky Trappy Forest to recover Tico's magic nut that can turn into your favorite food.

programme.title: E828 - The Perfect Day
programme.desc: Peppa and her family visit a big shop full of little shops! Mummy is visiting the spa for a 'Perfect Day Experience', so Peppa, George and Daddy Pig explore the shopping centre in search of their own perfect days!

programme.desc: The barbababies discover a strange cave. Barbalib tells the story of the caves Barbapapa and how they transformed. // The Barbababies have a sleepover in the living room. Fearing the monsters in the closet, they set up wacky traps to catch them.

programme.title: E114 - The Frozen Stowaways / The Puzzle Of The Empty Pond
programme.desc: The Stinkwells send Sam and Kit a strange and crawly case trapped in ice. // A salamander mom wonders why her dry pond hasn't filled up with water.

programme.title: E913 - Pups Stop A Mighty Eel
programme.desc: When an eel accidentally swallows a piece of the meteor and becomes gigantic, it's up to the Mighty Pups to save Adventure Bay.

programme.title: E2 - 《火力全開》舞台燃炸
programme.desc: 集結25位跨領域青春藝人，組建國內首個全明星流行表演合唱團「燃青團」；跳出傳統音樂真人秀的固化框架，不爭C位、不設淘汰，更關注合唱聲部，以團魂養成、情緒共振為核心，帶來全新觀看體驗；全景式記錄一群年輕人從陌生疏離到默契共生，從個體閃耀到集體綻放的熱血蛻變歷程。

programme.title: E8 - 新家庭加入反差兄弟萌點爆棚
programme.desc: 由伊能靜擔任團長，董璇、喬杉、李嘉格、余宇涵、沈奕斐等擔任觀察員，以「爸爸圖鑑」為主題，通過展現不同家庭的相處模式，聚焦三位背景各異、育兒方式不同的父親，記錄他們真實的帶娃日常，展現多元的家庭教育模式與溫馨的成長故事。

programme.title: E8 - 新家庭加入反差兄弟萌點爆棚
programme.desc: 由伊能靜擔任團長，董璇、喬杉、李嘉格、余宇涵、沈奕斐等擔任觀察員，以「爸爸圖鑑」為主題，通過展現不同家庭的相處模式，聚焦三位背景各異、育兒方式不同的父親，記錄他們真實的帶娃日常，展現多元的家庭教育模式與溫馨的成長故事。

programme.title: E10 - 孫紅雷一打五心態崩了
programme.desc: 沉浸式IP推理真人秀，由謝娜、黃子韜、寧靜、古力娜扎、孫紅雷、孫千、徐志勝組成「萌探家族」，他們將根據一部經典IP，進行實景還原、改編等演繹原劇片段，通過劇情的疑點及遊戲環節，獲取劇情線索，尋找劇情真相！

programme.title: E2 - 《火力全開》舞台燃炸
programme.desc: 集結25位跨領域青春藝人，組建國內首個全明星流行表演合唱團「燃青團」；跳出傳統音樂真人秀的固化框架，不爭C位、不設淘汰，更關注合唱聲部，以團魂養成、情緒共振為核心，帶來全新觀看體驗；全景式記錄一群年輕人從陌生疏離到默契共生，從個體閃耀到集體綻放的熱血蛻變歷程。

programme.title: San Michele - Venice's Cemetery Island
programme.desc: Venice is a city unlike any other, so it's no surprise its cemetery is also unique. Located halfway between the city of Venice and the glassblowing island of Murano, Venetians find their final resting place on the cemetery island of San Michele.

programme.title: San Michele - Venice's Cemetery Island

programme.title: Bodybuilding
programme.desc: Gen Z is more fitness-crazy than ever before. We meet Mirtel, 17 years old, in Tallinn, Estonia - she has ONE goal: to win gold at the European Bodybuilding Championships. We accompany them through the toughest phase of preparation and go to the championship in Spain. What does it cost to give EVERYTHING for this - and will it be enough in the end?

programme.title: The Chefs
programme.desc: What is their recipe for success? What challenges do they face? How do women in Asian society assert themselves in an industry still dominated by men? What is currently in vogue in the culinary world? In what way do cultural, social and ethical considerations also play a role?

programme.title: The Chefs

programme.title: San Michele - Venice's Cemetery Island
programme.desc: Venice is a city unlike any other, so it's no surprise its cemetery is also unique. Located halfway between the city of Venice and the glassblowing island of Murano, Venetians find their final resting place on the cemetery island of San Michele.

programme.title: Bodybuilding

programme.title: Bloomberg Daybreak: Europe

programme.title: E4 - Buster’s Big Football Match
programme.desc: Join Buster for a big day of soccer! He's excited to play, but learns that being a team player is the real way to win. Help Buster overcome his nerves, score a goal, and show that having fun with friends is the best prize of all!

programme.title: E4 - Buster’s Big Football Match
programme.desc: Join Buster for a big day of soccer! He's excited to play, but learns that being a team player is the real way to win. Help Buster overcome his nerves, score a goal, and show that having fun with friends is the best prize of all!

programme.title: E2 - How Awesome Things Work!
programme.desc: Blippi wants to find out how awesome things work! He & D.BO visit a construction site where they learn all about safety & how a crane works. Then, they meet Frankie the Firetruck to see all of her amazing fire-fighting abilities in action! After that, it's time for some speed as they meet an F1 race car & a giant monster truck to learn what makes them so special. Finally, Blippi shrinks down to see how a guitar makes beautiful music!

programme.title: E4 - Buster’s Big Football Match
programme.desc: Join Buster for a big day of soccer! He's excited to play, but learns that being a team player is the real way to win. Help Buster overcome his nerves, score a goal, and show that having fun with friends is the best prize of all!

programme.title: E2 - Sweet Dreams & Bedtime Songs!
programme.desc: Get ready for sweet dreams & bedtime songs! Mummy helps Mia begin her nighttime routine by tucking her toys into cozy spaces. Then, they try out some super simple & calming animal-related yoga poses to help Mia have a restful sleep. Daddy also shows Mia that routines can be fun with his 'brush your teeth dance'! Finally, Mummy & Daddy play a beautiful lullaby on their guitars to help soothe the kids to sleep under the twinkling stars.

programme.title: E4 - Sun, Moon, Stars
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: E4 - Buster’s Big Football Match
programme.desc: Join Buster for a big day of soccer! He's excited to play, but learns that being a team player is the real way to win. Help Buster overcome his nerves, score a goal, and show that having fun with friends is the best prize of all!

programme.title: E2 - How Does It Work?!
programme.desc: Blippi is wondering, 'How does it work?!' Join Blippi & his robot buddy FETCH on an adventure to find the answers! Blippi shrinks down to fly inside a beehive & learn how honey is made, & explores a garbage truck to find out why flies love it so much. Then, it’s a trip through a factory to see how chocolate is made! The adventure even travels through time as Blippi meets his great-grandpa to see the very first cars. Plus, Blippi & FETCH help a nervous crane learn to build a skyscraper!

programme.title: E4 - Buster’s Big Football Match
programme.desc: Join Buster for a big day of soccer! He's excited to play, but learns that being a team player is the real way to win. Help Buster overcome his nerves, score a goal, and show that having fun with friends is the best prize of all!

programme.title: E2 - The Whole Crew to the Rescue!
programme.desc: It's the whole crew to the rescue in these amazing adventures! When Kat doesn't know a car's throttle is stuck, she goes for a test drive & is soon out of control, forcing Grandma & Gecko to rescue her! Then, when a beach trip is cancelled because Tilly the Tow Truck breaks down, Trevor helps with a tow & then delivers a load of sand to create a surprise beach right at the garage! Plus, the whole crew jumps into action when Blue gets stranded alone down a steep bank.

programme.title: E1 - Underwater Problems & Clever Fixes
programme.desc: The Sharksons are using their brains for some clever underwater fixes! When all the contents of Tucker's bag fall out from a hole in his backpack, Stanley & Grub help him fix it so he can get to school. Then, when Grub can't get to sleep because she's afraid of the dark, Stanley has a clever idea to make a 'star' night light from a glove that floated down. From turning veggies into a fun game to sorting recycling, there's always a clever fix!

programme.title: E2 - How Awesome Things Work!

programme.title: Unlocked
programme.desc: Unlocked is a home tour series focused on how much people across the globe spend on their housing, what they get for the money and what they had to sacrifice to make it happen. CNBC opens the doors to unique homes and introduces you to the people inside so you can see what it's like to live there and exactly how much it costs.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: As he starts the final part of his journey deep into Iraq, Michael finds a local school in Baghdad and as he did in North Korea talks to the children about life in Iraq and what they hope to do in the future, and how they see the rest of the world. Michael then visits the ancient site of Babylon, a place he used to read about when he was studying the bible at school. He also gets access to enter the massive palace built by Saddam Hussein that overlooks the historic site.

programme.title: E15
programme.desc: 年輕狀元郎陸江來上任淳寧縣令後屢破奇案，卻因捲入一樁殺妻舊案，從官場新星淪落至絕境。瀕死之際，幸得茶王之女榮善寶搭救。兩人聯手整頓家族、開拓茶道，在茶園裡締結了一段愛情佳話。

programme.title: E55
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

The Movie Star Says -Lawrence Cheng
programme.desc: Lawrence Cheng has been working in the film industry over 40 years who was known with his friends in the 1980s as the creator of The Yuppie Fantasia franchise. In this episode, Cheng shares his motive of creation and key to success of such franchise, as well as how he got obsessed with film as teen. Looking back, he admits that he was not a very competent director and reveals more unforgettable stories of the past.

programme.title: Finale In Blood
programme.desc: An unusual story about an unusual love. Fang Yin comes from countryside to take over and run her father's hotel. She finds herself unable to cope. In distress, she turns to the first man ever to enter her life. It's a big mistake. One night, radio announcer Cheng Ming-pao is saved from drowning by the umbrella. He and she meet and confide in each other. It's Fang Yin's turn to tell Cheng Ming-pao she must leave him and that her ex-lover must pay the debt in kind...

programme.desc: The story of Ho, a chinese peasant/slave worker who escapes to Hong Kong and becomes one of the most feared crime bosses in Hong Kong.
